title.en: In total, about 140 million years of high-level...

content.en:
When he was just promoted to the Quasi-Dao Realm, he and the Terran did harvest a large amount of resources, but most of the resources were relatively average, and the accumulated value was just amazing.

What Ye Tian needed at the moment was a body refining resource that would be helpful for him to cultivate the Xuan Xuan Technique, and it had to be a high-level resource, because his physical body foundation was too high, and resources that were of great use to others might not be able to be useful to him.

There are many true monarchs in the Void Heaven lineage, Ye Tian went to the Void Heaven Palace, took out the resources in his hands one by one, and wanted to exchange them for high-level resources with others.

Many of the resources in Ye Tian's hands are not of much help to him, but they are of great help to others, plus he exchanges a large number of resources for a small part of the high-level resources, and the actual value is higher, so many True Monarchs are willing to exchange with Ye Tian.

However, there are not many high-level resources in the hands of other True Monarchs, and some True Monarchs are ready to spare them in the future, so naturally they will not trade too much.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai exchanged for high-level resources that were enough for his cultivation for 50 million years, and then exchanged a batch of high-level resources from the Void Heaven Points System, almost emptying the high-level resources.

In total, about 140 million years of high-level resources have been gathered!

These resources seem to be a lot, but Ye Tian is still not satisfied.

this day.

Yang Long Zhenjun came to see Ye Tian.

"Master, if you want to collect a large number of high-level resources, you may be able to go to Dutian Giant City.

"Where is that?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Master, you are often in retreat, and you don't go out of the Terran territory very much, so naturally you don't know much about Dutian Giant City, where is it outside the Void Heaven True Country, and it is not suitable for any True Country, but a chaotic area without the jurisdiction of the True Country. However, the two great forces of the Chaos Merchant House and the Giant Axe City have joined forces to build a majestic giant city in that chaotic area, that is, the Dutian Giant City, as a trading city, and the Chaos Merchant City will manage the transactions. And now, many great forces have settled in Dutian Giant City, and even the Void Heaven Temple has many True Monarchs involved. There, many valuable resources can be bought, and the intelligence is very well-informed. Yanglong Zhenjun explained.

"I see!"

Ye Tian had already made a decision in his heart, so he took Yanglong Zhenjun and prepared to go to Dutian Giant City.

The Void Heaven True Kingdom also has a teleportation array to go to the Dutian Giant City, otherwise, under the condition that many True Kingdoms are established, Ye Tian's Great Realm Teleportation is not easy to teleport, and it will take some time to go directly to the Dutian Giant City.

So, Ye Tian took the teleportation array, directly shuttled through the barrier of the True Kingdom, and came to the Dutian Giant City.

As soon as he entered this giant city, Ye Tian saw a lot of True Kingdoms, and any person on the street was a True Monarch, and there were even some powerhouses at the peak of True Monarch.

"Master, the largest trading house in the Heavenly Giant City is the Cullinan Pavilion under the command of the Chaos Merchant House, you can trade treasures to the Cullinan Pavilion, and you can also buy treasure resources from the Cullinan Pavilion. "

Yanglong Zhenjun said.

Soon, Ye Tian and Yang Long Zhenjun came to the Heavenly Cullinan Pavilion.

The Heavenly Cullinan Pavilion is very large, and it is not an ordinary building, it is a half-way, and it is also a top-notch half-way, there are top true monarchs in the interior, unless the true monarch is in trouble, and others dare to make trouble, they will be suppressed directly.

However, the True Monarch List also had to weigh the power of the Chaos Trading Firm, and almost no True Monarch dared to offend the Chaos Trading House.

Therefore, transactions within the Cullinan Pavilion are very safe.

The clerk in charge of trading in the Cullinan Pavilion was a True Monarch, but he was just an ordinary True Monarch, and his strength was not very strong.

"Two true monarchs, what do you want to buy?"

A Zhenjun clerk asked.

"Sell some resources, do you want to collect them?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Close!"

The clerk replied.

"I'm the Ten Thousand Laws Dao of the Void Heaven Palace, let the person in charge of you come over, you are not qualified!" Ye Tian said domineeringly.

"Ten Thousand Laws!"

This True Monarch clerk of the Heavenly Seal Pavilion had naturally heard of Ye Tian, this was the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, how could he not know it!

Although the true monarchs of the quasi-Dao realm are counted in the hundreds of millions, he basically knows about some Dao ancestors, disciples of various sects, and top true monarchs, otherwise it will be the end of it if he rashly offends people.

"Daozi wait for a while, I'll go and ask the pavilion master!"

The clerk hurriedly said.

After a while, the pavilion master of the Celestial Cullinan Pavilion came.

The pavilion master of the Heavenly Cullinan Pavilion is a powerful True Monarch at the peak of the True Monarch, named the Desolate Jade True Monarch, but he is not the True Monarch of the True Monarch List, just a good True Monarch Peak.

"It turned out to be the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi of the Void Heaven Palace, welcome to the Heavenly Seal Pavilion, I don't know what the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi wants to sell?"

Arama Zhenjun said with a grin.

"Some resources!"

Ye Tian took out a world ring, which was a ring made by refining a world, and the internal space was large enough to hold a large number of treasures.

As soon as the World Ring was taken out, Ye Tian revealed the treasure inside and presented it in the eyes of the Wild Jade True Monarch.

Suddenly, the dense treasure resources made the Wild Jade True Monarch slightly surprised.

Although he has seen a lot of treasures as the master of the Heavenly Seal Pavilion, it is true that there are not many transactions of so many treasures at one time.

"Wanfa Daozi is worth a lot of money, so many resources are a lot of wealth!"

"All of these are sold, I need a relatively high-level resource, at least a refining resource suitable for the top-level True Monarch refining body. Ye Tian said.

"The top-notch True Monarch's high-level body refining resources are very valuable. Wanfa Daozi should understand that when it comes to the top True Monarch level, it is too difficult to refine, and there are too few high-level refining resources, which everyone needs. "

Arama True Monarch Dao.

"I understand, I only ask if there is a Heavenly Seal Pavilion, if not, then I will leave!" Ye Tian didn't want to talk nonsense, and asked directly.

"Yes, of course!"

Arasoyu Zhenjun said with a smile: "In terms of wealth, the top forces are far inferior to our Chaos Trading Firm. Moreover, the true monarchs of our Chaos Merchant House are all good at finding, and many of the high-level resources that have just been promoted and born in the Quasi-Dao Realm have basically been scraped by the true monarchs of our Chaos Merchant House one by one, plus there are also many weak Heavenly Monarchs and half-step true spirits who have also sold some high-level resources to us, and our Chaos Merchant Bank naturally has a lot of high-level resources, but the price is definitely higher than Daozi expected. "

"It doesn't matter if the price is higher!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, then I'll replace all these resources in Daozi's hands with high-level resources, how about it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

"Daozi will need to wait a few months, after all, it will take time to mobilize resources!" Arayu Zhenjun estimated.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian nodded, and waited in Dutian Giant City.

In a flash, a few months passed.

The Wild Jade True Monarch informed Ye Tian that the advanced resources were complete.

Not long after, Ye Tian completed the transaction with the Desolate Jade True Monarch, and the batch of high-grade resources he harvested was enough for him to cultivate for 500 million years.

Ye Tian originally wanted to go back and come out after hundreds of millions of years of retreat, but just when he was about to leave, a news spread in Dutian Giant City.

"Master, something big has happened!"

Yang Long Zhenjun came back from outside, came to Ye Tian's face, and reported: "The realm of the origin of the realm was born, and it appeared in a small true country, and countless big forces in the entire quasi-Dao realm were alarmed!"
